nodalDepartmentName.label: Medical Health And Family Welfare Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Integrated Toll Free 104 Helpline” is an initiative under the National Health Mission (NHM), implemented by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide the general public with round-the-clock (24×7×365) access to reliable health information and medical advice through the toll-free number 104.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under the National Health Mission (NHM), the Integrated Toll-Free 104 Helpline is being operated 24×7×365day. Through this helpline, health-related advice and information can be obtained.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide the general public with round-the-clock (24×7×365) access to reliable health information and medical advice through the toll-free number 104.

children.text: The scheme “Integrated Toll Free 104 Helpline” is an initiative under the National Health Mission (NHM), implemented by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide the general public with round-the-clock (24×7×365) access to reliable health information and medical advice through the toll-free number 104.
Under the National Health Mission (NHM), the Integrated Toll-Free 104 Helpline is being operated 24×7×365day. Through this helpline, health-related advice and information can be obtained.
The related information can be obtained by calling the helpline number 104.

applicationProcess.process_md: The related information can be obtained by calling the helpline number 104.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The general public of Uttarakhand is eligible to avail the benefits.

children.text: The general public of Uttarakhand is eligible to avail the benefits.
